top_signals.title: Copper Declines as Fresh US-Iran Flareup Stokes Inflation Fears
top_signals.summary: Copper inched lower for a third day as fresh fighting in the Middle East raised concern around faster inflation, higher interest rates and slower economic growth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB announces main milestones for roll-out of Integrated Reporting Framework
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/05 - Implementation of Bank of England Statistics Taxonomy v1.3.1
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bond Traders Bet on a Fed Hike in 2026 Even After Soft Core CPI - Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: Bond Traders Bet on a Fed Hike in 2026 Even After Soft Core CPI  Bloomberg
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Suspense surrounds Swiss anti-immigration vote
top_signals.summary: The proposal to cap the population would require cuts to immigration that critics warn risk crippling swathes of the economy and Switzerland's relations with the European Union.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asia’s currency fight moves offshore as central banks push back
top_signals.summary: Policymakers have ramped up efforts to curb offshore forex speculation as high oil prices, foreign fund exodus and a strong dollar pressure regional currencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The ‘Miasma’ worm source code briefly leaked on GitHub
top_signals.summary: The Miasma credential-stealing attack framework, which has recently targeted open-source ecosystems through supply-chain attacks, was briefly open-sourced on GitHub. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
